title: イグサの香りに想いを乗せて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, we're at an inn to take photos for a
magazine feature on signature racewear.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
This is niiice! We'll be able to take some classy
photos here!

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
For sure! There are plenty of locations around
here that will perfectly complement your
signature racewear, Inari!

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
We can showcase your energetic, wild side with
some photos of you posing on the rocks by the
stream!

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
Or we could snap some shots of your racewear
billowing in the breeze in a wide-open area!

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text: What kind of shot were you imagining, Inari?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Weeell, indoors is probably best. Like a
Japanese-style tatami room or somethin'?

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
Ah, indoors? Well, I think a tatami backdrop
would certainly suit you.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
All right. How 'bout we take some shots as a test
to see if they work or not?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Howzat?

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
I-incredible! Your expression is so vibrant and
exudes a dignified strength! Let's take the photos
here!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taking a look myself, I can see Inari One's lively
spirit practically leaping out of the pictures.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Heh, cut it out! You're gonna make me blush!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
For me, the tatami from Japanese-style rooms is
like a childhood friend. It gets me all fired up, ya
know?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. A buddy who's been with me through thick
'n' thin! Ever since we were kids!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Chief used to get a group of us together to teach
us runnin' at his house.

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text:
That's why ya gotta watch your pacin'... Hey,
Inari! Quit sleepin' on the tatami!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I just love the smell of the rush grass, ya know? I'd
often fall right asleep and get a scoldin' for it!

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text:
Easy there, I said ya don't gotta sit in seiza till
you're used to it!

text_block_list.name: Young Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Sh-shaddup! You don't needa take it easy on us
Edo girls!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I often went a li'l overboard, tryna impress Chief
and the others...

text_block_list.name: Young Oi Racer A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Inari. What're ya plannin' to do in the
future?

text_block_list.name: Young Inari One
text_block_list.text: Do ya even gotta ask? My plan's to make sure everyone knows the name Inari of Edo!

text_block_list.name: Young Oi Racer B
text_block_list.text:
Oh-ho, that's some big talk! Ya gotta beat me
before any of that's gonna happen!

text_block_list.name: Young Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hey! Ya only won by a nose! A difference like that
don't mean squat!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
We'd talk 'bout our dreams, fight, laugh, and
cry... Man, those were good times.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
So, if it's pictures we're takin', we've gotta include
tatami.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
That way, I know the folks back home will see the
tatami and understand.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
They'll say, "That Inari, she's still followin' her
dream!"

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
"Past or present, there's always tatami under her
feet!"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm inspired by her story and eager to see her next
pictures turn out even better.
choice_data_list: Let's make it a classy photo shoot!

Since you'll be on tatami, what if you pose
sitting in seiza?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
No worries, I got this! I'll show ya just how classy
the great Inari can be!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh, I can already imagine the smiles on Chief
and the others' faces!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that mindset, we power through the shoot,
successfully getting some classy shots.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
No problem at all! I'll sit one hour, two
hours—however long it takes!
choice_data_list:
I thought you weren't good at doing seiza for
extended times...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Heh! What? You think I haven't grown?! The only
thing that hasn't changed 'bout me is my dream!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After apologizing for underestimating Inari One,
we proceed with the photo shoot as she requests.
